text: It looks like this is still an issue - please remove all references to "PRD" in the settings menu

proposedTasks.title: Remove all PRD references from settings menus
proposedTasks.description: Audit every label, heading, tooltip, and placeholder in the project settings UI and remove or reword any mention of "PRD" (e.g., "(PRD 6.5)", "See PRD §6.3"). Replace with user-friendly descriptions that convey the same information without exposing internal document references. Acceptance criteria: 1) No string in the settings UI contains the substring "PRD". 2) All affected labels remain clear and informative after rewording. 3) Covers both the project-setup wizard screens and the in-project settings panel.

taskTitles: Remove all PRD references from settings menus
